notes: Spec 37 addressed three Gen Agent Trust Hub HIGH findings: (1) shell injection on pr_number — added ^[1-9][0-9]{0,5}$ validation in Step 1; (2) prompt injection — added <untrusted_pr_content> boundary tags in Step 3; (3) runtime Python codegen — replaced inline codegen with static references/marker-helper.py. W011 (high) is a Snyk Agent Scan heuristic that fires on the presence of `gh pr view`/`gh pr diff` ingestion patterns regardless of mitigations — the substantive defense is the Step 3 <untrusted_pr_content> boundary framing plus the static marker helper. Baseline initialized from CI scan output on 2026-05-25 (spec 40); previously empty findings list was a placeholder anticipating this exact finding.
